uplink._note: fPort 6 data report (reportType 0x01). bytes[3]=30 -> 3.0 V battery; bytes[4]=1 -> liquid bridging the electrode rods -> water.leak true. Input bytes taken from the upstream TTN example; expected.data authored to the normalized vocabulary.
Same frame with bytes[4]=0 (no liquid) -> water.leak false.

uplink.description: Status report, leak true with low-battery flag
uplink._note: bytes[3]=157 (0x9D): high bit set -> lowBattery; low 7 bits = 29 -> 2.9 V. bytes[4]=1 -> water.leak true.

uplink.description: Configure report response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
uplink._note: fPort 7 is config request/response; no normalized measurement. Input bytes from the upstream TTN ConfigReportRsp example.
